reasoning: FSIS recalls generally take 3 to 9 months to be officially marked as "Closed" on the public website, even for short-shelf-life, locally distributed products. The bureaucratic process involving effectiveness checks, district office reports, and RMTAD review, followed by site updates, usually encounters some lags. A 97-day window (Feb 24 to June 1) is a relatively short timeframe for an official status update, situating the closure probability on the lower side.
